name: auroraops-client
description: AuroraOps desktop client with embedded Rust agent for device binding, terminal access, remote desktop control, and asset collection.

scripts.build: npm run build:agent && tsx .electron-vite/build.ts -m prod && electron-builder -c build.json
scripts.build:win32: npm run build:agent && tsx .electron-vite/build.ts -m prod  && electron-builder -c build.json --win  --ia32
scripts.build:win64: npm run build:agent && tsx .electron-vite/build.ts -m prod  && electron-builder -c build.json --win  --x64
scripts.build:win64:arm64: npm run build:agent && tsx .electron-vite/build.ts -m prod && electron-builder -c build.json --win --arm64
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:agent && tsx .electron-vite/build.ts -m prod  && electron-builder -c build.json --mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:agent && tsx .electron-vite/build.ts -m prod && electron-builder -c build.json --linux deb rpm --x64 --arm64
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run build:agent && tsx .electron-vite/build.ts -m prod && electron-builder -c build.json --linux deb rpm --x64
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run build:agent && tsx .electron-vite/build.ts -m prod && electron-builder -c build.json --linux deb rpm --arm64
scripts.build:dir: npm run build:agent && tsx .electron-vite/build.ts -m prod  && electron-builder -c build.json --dir
